title: euosma callosa
intro: Euosma callosa, also known as Callichilia callosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a tropical plant native to the tropical regions of West Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various infections. In herbal preparations, Euosma callosa is often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
